description: all-null benchmark rows degrade to structural_only with market claims withheld
assertions: critique_mode is structural_only because every relevant benchmark range is null
market_position is null and no above/below/competitive claim is made
data_gaps names each unsourced benchmark metric
the structural review still ships (sections, rate labeling, FTC, sourcing)

description: a sourced benchmark range yields a benchmarked-mode standing

input._note_for_reviewer: exercised when a benchmark row for the metric is sourced (non-null low/high)

assertions: critique_mode is benchmarked when at least one range is sourced
metric_standings reports gap_assessment above/below/within for the sourced metric
any still-null metric is listed in data_gaps, never guessed

description: a rate presented as personal without labeling is flagged
assertions: rate_review compares the figure to the structured rate rows
an unlabeled personal-vs-industry rate is flagged with a fix
no benchmark or rate is fabricated

description: the atom does market critique, never the internal Quality Gates
assertions: missing required sections (rates, contact) are structural issues with fixes
the output does not score integrity, safety, or the other Quality Gates dimensions
market-position language appears only in benchmarked mode
